prompt: Create a clean anime-style digital portrait of a muscular male fitness influencer, upper body cropped at the waist, standing in a confident bodybuilding pose with hands clasped low in front of his torso. He has short spiky black hair, tan skin, extremely broad shoulders, large defined arms, visible chest and neck anatomy, and sharp cel-shaded muscle contours. His face is intentionally covered by a centered square privacy block in a soft beige skin-tone gradient. He wears a loose black stringer tank top with deep armholes; on the chest is one white printed branding element reading TEAM SHAPE above a shield-like monogram emblem. On the left side of the white background is one separate black brand mark: a stylized shield monogram above the stacked words TIBO INSHAPE. Use crisp Japanese anime line art, smooth shading, high-contrast fitness-poster lighting, minimal background, centered composition, and a polished social-media avatar look.
